Grounds auto-identify and investigate work. Contradictions scan works with empty body. Legal Framework page verified - all 4 sections visible without tabs.

Frontend: Legal Framework page shows ALL 4 sections without tabs on one scrollable page
Frontend: Legal Framework sections: Criminal Law, Evidence Acts, Appeal Legislation, Human Rights all visible
